gold: Evet, ben zaten onun için aramıştım.
werNormalizedGold: evet ben zaten onun için aramıştım
sigWerNormalizedGold: evet ben zaten onun için aramıştım

sigWerErrors.reason: Omitting 'ben' (I) removes the subject of the sentence, which changes who is performing the action and alters the meaning.
'Onun' (his/her/its) and 'onu' (him/her/it) are different grammatical forms; this changes the meaning of the sentence but not as drastically as a full subject or verb change.
Omitting 'aramıştım' (I had called) removes the main verb and action of the sentence, making the actual sentence about something else entirely.
